title: Long Compton interconnector overhead line (1644204), S37 consent, Electricity Act 1989
body: "Secretary of State’s screening decisions in accordance with the Electricity Works (Environmental Impact Assessment) (England and Wales) Regulations 2017.  Date of decision  18 February 2025  Location   Long ComptonStratford on Avon   Type of project / consent requested  Section 37 consent to install or keep installed an electric line. "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
